title: IENE-409 If you make a schoolgirl on the way home from school in Tokyo change into a swimsuit, pretending to be a "reader model's 30-minute part-time job", no matter what naughty pose you request, it's too serious to refuse
overview: A self-proclaimed cameraman Nampa who skillfully calls out to school girls in the city, "I'm looking for a reader model ..." in the midst of heavy snowfall outside the season. Because it was a simple shoot, I took him to the hotel room and took pictures one after another, but gradually the shooting became a suspicious atmosphere.
